name: ADC HAC structure (OCP Redmond interface)
source_documents: 7 working captures + ADC detail drawings in products/HAC/
telemetry_domain: physical carrier — Levels 2–4 trays route the D2/D4 network; busducts feed the racks

parameters.value: factory-cut, pre-drilled, barcoded, site-bolted structure kit (posts, base plates, X-beams, cross-aisle beams, hangers, baskets, unistrut) — no field welding
containment panels (§18.6), busduct attachment (§18.7), RDHx + its containment (§18.9), PCW above Level 4
Google 28-in x 4-wide drop-in (Redmond); NVIDIA 24-in x 5-wide per MISSION.md — NVIDIA variant not yet engineered
parametric repeatable bay, inch-primary, fixed critical params vs fungible params per products/HAC/README.md (HAC-OI-05)
